---
applyTo: "**/*.ts,**/*.tsx,**/*.py"
---

# Supabase – Instructions

- **Documentation**: always refer to <https://supabase.com/llms.txt>
- **MCP**: you can use the Supabase MCP server configured in `vscode/mcp.json` to test your implementations and consult the official documentation. Make sure to replace the ACCESS_TOKEN with a personal one, which can be generated at <https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens>.
